---
name: duckdb
description: Use when the user wants the right DuckDB sub-skill for querying data, installing extensions, searching docs, or spatial and geographic analysis.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

# DuckDB Router

Index of DuckDB skills. Invoke the right skill by name (all children are user-invoked).

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `data-access` | Read, profile, convert, run SQL (`sql`), or attach a database (`--attach`) for data files and remote object storage. |
| `spatial` | Query or analyze spatial data with DuckDB's spatial extension. |
| `duckdb-docs` | Search DuckDB or DuckLake documentation and blog posts. |
| `install-duckdb` | Install or update DuckDB extensions. |
